title: The Village Says Goodbye
description: On pages 9–12, the village says goodbye focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.
scene: On pages 9–12, the village says goodbye focuses on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as the village celebrates after Arlong’s defeat while Nami prepares to leave her home behind.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahaha haha! These two sure know how to dance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: gyaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: for my 6" number, I'll sing the "usopp cheer song!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The Day of the Depar- tune

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We must now return back to our job as bounty hunters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So thank you for all your help until now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Though we must say good-bye,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: may we meet once again someplace else in the future.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I see then. Take care.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: the same to you, my brothers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where is she anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Maybe she's not coming?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!? Is Nami really not coming!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: faint

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hey! That raw ham melon you were talking about wasn't anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: She's leaving all her money behind!? All 100 million bellis!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She's not taking any of her money with her?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But she risked her life to save up that much...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She said it's fine,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Since she can always steal more...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I told her to take a little bit at least,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But she wouldn't hear of it. You know how she is.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: that fool...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's us who should be trying to make things up to her after all she did...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nacchan!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: She's running over here? What do we do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: She said set sail so... I guess we should set sail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't tell me... she's planning to leave,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Without letting us say even a word of thanks or goodbye...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: raise the sail!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, stop!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: At least let us thank you for all you've done!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ahh! They're taking off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: But we needed to thank you pirates t...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Set sail!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Nami, wait! I can't allow you to leave this way!

summary: This part releases the tension of Arlong Park through celebration, goodbye, and Nami’s choice to sail with the crew.
